info.name: Portfolio API - v1.0.0
info.description: Complete API collection for Portfolio CMS. Backend: Express.js + Drizzle ORM + PostgreSQL. Includes authentication, CRUD operations for projects/skills/experiences, contact messages, profile management, and image uploads via Cloudinary.

request.description: Check if API is running
Example workflow: 1) Login → 2) Get Profile → 3) Create Project → 4) Upload Images → 5) Update Profile
Authenticate admin user and receive JWT token. Token expires in 90 days.
Get public profile information. Creates default profile if none exists.

response.name: Success - 200 OK

request.description: Create a new experience entry. Required: company, role, period, description, technologies.

Send a contact message. Rate limited: 5 requests per hour per IP. Required: name, email, message.

response.name: Success - 201 Created

request.description: Get all contact messages. Requires admin authentication. Sorted by createdAt descending.

request.description: Mark a message as read. Requires admin authentication.
Upload a single image to Cloudinary. Max file size: 5MB. Allowed types: JPEG, PNG, WebP, GIF.
